lambda_a.value: λ_a (constant failure rate per hour when all 15 power supplies are operating)
lambda_a.description: The constant failure rate (per hour) of each power supply when all 15 power supplies are operating.

lambda_b.value: λ_b (failure rate per hour of each remaining power supply when one has already failed)
lambda_b.description: The failure rate (per hour) of each of the 14 remaining power supplies when one power supply has already failed, where λ_a ≤ λ_b.

mu.value: μ (constant repair rate per hour for a failed power supply)
mu.description: The constant repair rate (per hour) for a failed power supply.

n_total.description: Total number of identical active power supplies in the system.

n_min_required.description: Minimum number of power supplies required for the system to function (system fails when 2 power supplies fail).
